description: Combined XRD algorithms: each runs the whole pipeline in one pass (per-frame detection + cross-bin linking + Voigt shape verification) and emits final spatially-validated features. Developed per bin (CVEvolve); names carry the bin. holdout_f1/holdout_f2 are that session's holdout scores. These are per-frame (1x1) pipelines run by 'xrd-app run-combined' (not the binned 'peaks' pipeline). Automated algorithms live in their own named sub-folder.
metric: holdout_f1 / holdout_f2 (spatially-validated holdout score; higher is better)

detectors.name: 1x1_baseline
detectors.notes: Per-frame baseline: detect + cross-bin link + Voigt filter -> validated peaks.

detectors.name: 1x1_perframe_uf_voigt_hybrid
detectors.notes: Developed on 1x1 (CVEvolve, F2 recall-first). Best F2 of the 1x1 session.

detectors.name: 1x1_global_perframe_uf_voigt
detectors.notes: Whole-scan-efficient sibling of 1x1_perframe_uf_voigt_hybrid. Exposes run_full_scan: detect every frame once, Union-Find link across all frames, Voigt-verify each feature once (~50-100x faster than the per-center-bin loop; days -> ~1-2h). Trade-offs: global (not local) background, verify once-per-feature, no radius-2 local-stack supplement (recall trade-off). Not yet holdout-scored.
